overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character in winter gear walking through a snowy, rocky landscape at night. The character carries a flashlight that illuminates the path ahead as they navigate through an isolated, desolate mountain environment toward and around a large rock formation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered mountain plateau with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward a large illuminated rock formation in the distance

entered.detail: prominent white-gray rock formation illuminated by flashlight, serving as the main landmark
small to medium rocks scattered across the snowy landscape
small to medium rocks scattered across the snowy landscape
snow-covered ground with footprints visible in the flashlight beam

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a desolate, snow-covered mountain landscape at night. A flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing a large rock formation in the distance. The terrain is wide open with scattered boulders visible on both sides under a dark cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between large rock outcrops

events.description: large rock formation passes close on the right, temporarily blocking side view
character adjusts path to navigate around the right side of the rock formation

agents.ego_description: navigating around the right side of the large rock formation, adjusting course to avoid collision while maintaining forward progress

entered.detail: smaller rock formation visible to the left as the main rock is passed

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the large rock formation on its right side. The flashlight illuminates the textured surface of the rock as the character navigates the narrow passage. The rock temporarily dominates the right side of the frame before being left behind as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky snow field with distant mountain formations

events.description: terrain becomes more uneven with increased rock density and rougher snow surface

agents.ego_description: continuing through the open snowy terrain toward distant rock formations on the horizon

entered.detail: new rock formations appearing on the horizon ahead
snow-covered rocky slope rising on the left side

segments.scene_description: Having passed the main rock formation, the character continues through increasingly rugged terrain. The landscape opens up again with distant rock formations visible ahead. The ground becomes more uneven with patches of exposed rock mixed with snow as the character progresses deeper into the desolate mountain environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, snowy mountain landscape at night that transitions from wide-open plains to a narrow rocky passage and back into a rugged wilderness. It begins with the character walking across an expansive, snow-covered terrain under a dark cloudy sky, with a flashlight cutting through the darkness to reveal a large rock formation in the distance. As the character advances, the scene narrows as they pass closely along the right side of the massive rock, its textured surface dominating the frame within the beam of light. The environment then opens up once more as the character leaves the formation behind, moving into increasingly uneven ground where patches of exposed rock break through the snow. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the desolate environment, heading toward further distant rock formations across the rugged mountain expanse.
